'''M'uhk'gfa''' was a type of heavy battle [[Armor/Legends|armor]] that was utilized by many [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] warriors. This type of battle plate was traditionally welded by the warriors that wore them, welding pieces of metal that had been scavenged from the battlefields of their victories, giving each individual's armor a distinct appearance.

{{Stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
Ironically in [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords|''Knights of the Old Republic II'']], only [[Human/Legends|Humans]] can equip this armor despite it being made for Gamorreans.

In ''[[Kessel: Hell in Space]]'', Gamorrean [[battle armor]] is mentioned, but it is unclear from the source if this is referring to m'uhk'gfa or just battle armor that had been worn by Gamorreans.<ref name="Hell in Space">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/sw20030501kessel|text=Kessel: Hell in Space|int=Kessel: Hell in Space}}</ref>
